title: GCD Sort of an Array
titleCn: 数组的最大公因数排序

testcases.input: nums = [7,21,3] Output: true Explanation: We can sort [7,21,3] by performing the following operations: - Swap 7 and 21 because gcd(7,21) = 7. nums = [21,7,3] - Swap 21 and 3 because gcd(21,3) = 3. nums = [3,7,21]
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can sort [7,21,3] by performing the following operations: - Swap 7 and 21 because gcd(7,21) = 7. nums = [21,7,3] - Swap 21 and 3 because gcd(21,3) = 3. nums = [3,7,21]

testcases.input: nums = [5,2,6,2] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to sort the array because 5 cannot be swapped with any other element.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to sort the array because 5 cannot be swapped with any other element.

testcases.input: nums = [10,5,9,3,15] Output: true We can sort [10,5,9,3,15] by performing the following operations: - Swap 10 and 15 because gcd(10,15) = 5. nums = [15,5,9,3,10] - Swap 15 and 3 because gcd(15,3) = 3. nums = [3,5,9,15,10] - Swap 10 and 15 because gcd(10,15) = 5. nums = [3,5,9,10,15]
testcases.expectedOutput: true We can sort [10,5,9,3,15] by performing the following operations: - Swap 10 and 15 because gcd(10,15) = 5. nums = [15,5,9,3,10] - Swap 15 and 3 because gcd(15,3) = 3. nums = [3,5,9,15,10] - Swap 10 and 15 because gcd(10,15) = 5. nums = [3,5,9,10,15]
